---
title: "`closeread` Projects"
author: 
  - name: "Andy Grogan-Kaylor"
    url: https://agrogan1.github.io/
date: "today"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

library(bslib)

library(shiny)

library(htmltools)

```

`closeread` *scrollytelling* projects using [https://closeread.dev/](https://closeread.dev/)

* [https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/parenting/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/parenting/)
* [https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/be-less-wrong/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/be-less-wrong/)
* [https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/spillover-of-violence/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/spillover-of-violence/)
* [https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/logarithms/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/logarithms/) | ([simplified version](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/logarithms-simple/))
* [https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/normativeness-of-violence/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/normativeness-of-violence/)
* [https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/triangulation/triangulation.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/triangulation/triangulation.html)
* [https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/empathy/empathy.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/empathy/empathy.html)
* [https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/patterns/patterns.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/patterns/patterns.html)


Not a `closeread` document, but a tutorial on using *OJS*, which can be useful in `closeread` documents:  [https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/ojs-demo/ojs-demo.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/ojs-demo/ojs-demo.html)


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: false

layout_column_wrap(
  width = 1/2,
  # height = 300, 
  card(card_header(class = "bg-dark", 
                   "Patterns Of Caregiver Aggressive And Nonaggressive Discipline"), 
       card_body(card_image(src = "https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/patterns/patterns.png"), 
                 markdown("[https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/patterns/patterns.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/patterns/patterns.html)"))), 
  
  card(card_header(class = "bg-dark", 
                   "Parenting and Child Development"), 
       card_body(card_image(src = "https://agrogan1.github.io/closeread/parenting/positiveparenting.png"),
                 markdown("[https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/parenting/](https://globalfamilies.quarto.pub/parenting/)"))))

```
